html:
Exclusive to:

The Grim Galette is a Warly-specific Vegetable Food Item cooked in the Portable Crock Pot that is exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It requires two Nightmare Fuel, a Potato and an Onion to cook. Upon consuming a Grim Galette, the player's current Health and Sanity percentage values are swapped. Grim Galettes will not swap sanity and age of Wanda.

Wearing a Nightmare Amulet or the Bone Helm and eating a Grim Galette will cause instant death.

Recipe

×2

Trivia

  • Grim Galette was added to Don't Starve Together in Warly's Character Update.
  • The Grim Galette and Mushy Cake are the only dishes in with only one possible recipe.
  • Grim Galette, besides Jellybeans, is the only food item that can be used to restore Wormwood's health.
  • Galette is a term used in French cuisine to designate various types of flat round or freeform crusty cakes.
  • Despite the name of this item, its appearance and ingredients used are more similar to butter pie than true galettes, with the Nightmare Fuel in the place of the butter.

Gallery

  • A Grim Galette as seen in a drawing from Art Stream # 78.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

The Grim Galette is a Warly-specific Vegetable Food Item cooked in the Portable Crock Pot that is exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It requires two Nightmare Fuel, a Potato and an Onion to cook. Upon consuming a Grim Galette, the player's current Health and Sanity percentage values are swapped. Grim Galettes will not swap sanity and age of Wanda.
Wearing a Nightmare Amulet or the Bone Helm and eating a Grim Galette will cause instant death.

Trivia[edit | edit source]
Grim Galette was added to Don't Starve Together in Warly's Character Update.
The Grim Galette and Mushy Cake are the only dishes in with only one possible recipe.
Grim Galette, besides Jellybeans, is the only food item that can be used to restore Wormwood's health.
Galette is a term used in French cuisine to designate various types of flat round or freeform crusty cakes.
Despite the name of this item, its appearance and ingredients used are more similar to butter pie than true galettes, with the Nightmare Fuel in the place of the butter.

The '''Grim Galette''' is a [[Warly]]-specific [[Vegetable]] [[Food]] [[Item]] cooked in the [[Portable Crock Pot]] that is exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It requires two [[Nightmare Fuel]], a [[Potato]] and an [[Onion]] to cook. Upon consuming a Grim Galette, the player's current [[Health]] and [[Sanity]] percentage values are swapped. Grim Galettes will not swap sanity and age of [[Wanda]].

Wearing a [[Nightmare Amulet]] or the [[Bone Helm]] and eating a Grim Galette will cause instant death.

== {{pic|32|Cookbook}} Recipe ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Nightmare Fuel
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Onions
|item3 = Potatoes
|tool = Portable Crock Pot
|result = Grim Galette}}

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* Grim Galette was added to ''Don't Starve Together'' in Warly's [[Don't Starve Together/Version History#July 25, 2019 - Warly Character Update|Character Update]].
*The Grim Galette and [[Mushy Cake]] are the only dishes in {{DST|24}} with only one possible recipe.
* Grim Galette, besides [[Jellybeans]], is the only food item that can be used to restore [[Wormwood]]'s health.
* [[Wikipedia:Galette|Galette]] is a term used in French cuisine to designate various types of flat round or freeform crusty cakes.
* Despite the name of this item, its appearance and ingredients used are more similar to [[Wikipedia:Butter pie|butter pie]] than true galettes, with the Nightmare Fuel in the place of the butter.
